subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 745811685 / 240820080 is not a GRB
submitter: Peter Veres at University of Alabama in Huntsville <veresp@gmail.com>
body:
P. Veres (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 745811685 / 240820080 at 01:54:40 UT on 20 August 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to particle activity."

For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit
the official Fermi GBM Support Page:
https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/
